title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Vinci Vision Properties Ltd
body: "Application number 5212  Applicant Vinci objected to the name used by Vinci Vision Properties Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 21 May 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Vinci Vision Properties Ltd is changed to 16050065, Ltd. "
